refnamediv.refpurpose: Makes a Geometry from WKT representation with the given SRID. If SRID is not given, it defaults to 0.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Makes a Geometry from WKT with the given SRID. If SRID is not given, it defaults to 0. If WKT passed in is not a LINESTRING, then null is returned.

note.para: OGC SPEC 3.2.6.2 - option SRID is from the conformance suite.
If you know all your geometries are LINESTRINGS, its more efficient to just use ST_GeomFromText. This just calls ST_GeomFromText and adds additional validation that it returns a linestring.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting: SELECT ST_LineFromText('LINESTRING(1 2, 3 4)') AS aline, ST_LineFromText('POINT(1 2)') AS null_return; aline | null_return ------------------------------------------------ 010200000002000000000000000000F ... | t
